name: Jamie Foxx
blurb: Eric Marlon Bishop, known as Jamie Foxx, is an American actor, comedian, singer, and producer who began stand-up at an open mic in 1989 and joined the sketch series In Living Color in 1991.
bio: Eric Marlon Bishop, known as Jamie Foxx, is an American actor, comedian, singer, and producer who began stand-up at an open mic in 1989 and joined the sketch series In Living Color in 1991. He created and starred in The Jamie Foxx Show from 1996 to 2001, then won the Academy Award for Best Actor for portraying Ray Charles in Ray (2004). Alongside an acclaimed film career and a successful R&B recording career, he returned to stand-up with the 2024 Netflix special What Had Happened Was after recovering from a 2023 stroke.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up at a comedy club open mic
Joins the cast of In Living Color
Creates and stars in The Jamie Foxx Show
Stars as Ray Charles in Ray
Wins the Academy Award for Best Actor
Releases Netflix special What Had Happened Was

accolades: Academy Award for Best Actor for Ray (2005)
Grammy Award for Best R&B Performance for Blame It
BAFTA Award for Best Actor for Ray
